system.description: The tree is dead, but the axe remembers. Clean out the memories and roll [quality].
system.synopsis: Gain a trophy when you eliminate a target

outcomes.success: your gun expels a trophy of the most recently Eliminated target: something they were holding, a piece of their skeleton, something they said. You choose what the trophy is, how fast it is expelled, and where it is aimed.
outcomes.eachplus3: your Gun may expel an additional trophy from the most recent target or a trophy from the target immediately prior. Additional 3s can continue to move backwards through the Gun’s history of Eliminated targets.
outcomes.failure: your Gun expels an unrecognizable mass that is extremely difficult to clean up and the next 3 rolls you make suffer from Burnout.

improvement.question: Only you answer this question: Will you mourn them all?
